title: gardenia oblongifolia
intro: Gardenia oblongifolia, also known as the round-leaved gardenia or round-leaf gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gardenia oblongifolia include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of the common cold.
